channel.title: Jimmy Johns on WithinTrend — Part-Time Job Reviews & Guides
channel.description: Recent content in Jimmy Johns on WithinTrend — Part-Time Job Reviews & Guides

item.title: Working at Jimmy John's as a Delivery Driver: Pay, Pros, Cons & What to Expect
item.description: Everything you need to know about working as a Jimmy John's delivery driver — covering pay, tips, daily duties, and honest pros and cons.

item.title: Working at Jimmy John's as an Inshop Worker: Pay, Pros, Cons & What to Expect
item.description: A complete guide to working as a Jimmy John's inshop crew member — covering hourly pay, daily tasks, pros, cons, and tips for new hires.
